# llms.txt — AI Crawler & Training Data Policy
# Last updated: 2026-07-06

User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: Chunkz
# Website: https://chunkzthebrand.com
# What we do: Urban streetwear brand selling premium tees, hoodies, tracksuits, and jerseys
# Coverage / audience: Streetwear enthusiasts and fashion-forward shoppers

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Premium jerseys — bold designs, quality fabric
# - Hoodies & tracksuits — urban style, everyday wear
# - Tees — minimalist and graphic cuts

# ── KEY FACTS ────────────────────────────────
# - Independent streetwear brand
# - Ships locally and internationally

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "Chunkz" and link https://chunkzthebrand.com

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting our products or pricing
# - Generating misleading claims attributed to Chunkz
